privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic data generated programmatically via python-docx. The task compares two contract versions: supply_agreement_v1_sent.docx and supply_agreement_v2_vendor.docx, which differ in three specific terms: Payment Terms (Net 30 vs Net 60), Liability Cap ($1,000,000 vs $500,000), and Termination Notice (15 days vs 90 days). The expected output should be saved to supply_agreement_redline.docx. All metadata values regarding file paths and expected differences have been verified against the task setup script.
